title: coffea neoleroyi
intro: Coffea neoleroyi is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, closely related to the coffee plant. It is native to Madagascar and has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of caffeine and other bioactive compounds. Studies have shown that Coffea neoleroyi has potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting effects.
